function.name: get_distance_between_cities
function.long_description: Calculates the geographical distance between two cities by converting city names into coordinates using an external mapping API and applying a standard distance formula.
example_user_queries: How far is New York from Boston?
Calculate the distance between San Francisco and Los Angeles.
What is the distance from Chicago to Detroit?
Find the distance between Mumbai and Pune.
Show the distance from London to Manchester.
Get the travel distance between Delhi and Jaipur.
How far apart are Seattle and Portland?
Measure the distance from Paris to Lyon.
Calculate city distance for city_from Austin and city_to Houston.
Tell me the distance between Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
